title: quercus neoplatyphylla
intro: Quercus neoplatyphylla is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae) and is native to East Asia, particularly in China, Japan, and Korea. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus neoplatyphylla include reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and protecting against oxidative stress and inflammation. Quercus neoplatyphylla can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as tea, extracts, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
